_templateDescription:
Generate Videos from Images with Wan 2.2 I2V A14B AI Model

рҹҢҚ Overview

This workflow connects n8n with ReplicateвҖҷs Wan-Video model to generate video content from an image + prompt.
It handles:

рҹ”‘ API authentication
рҹ“Ө Sending a generation request
вҸі Polling until completion
рҹ“Ҙ Returning a downloadable video link

рҹҹў Section 1: Start & Authentication

рҹ”— Nodes:
1пёҸвғЈ On clicking 'execute' (Manual Trigger)
в–¶пёҸ Starts the workflow manually when you click Execute Workflow.

2пёҸвғЈ Set API Key
рҹ”‘ Stores your Replicate API Key securely inside n8n.

Value: YOUR_REPLICATE_API_KEY

рҹ’Ў Beginner Benefit:
вң… No need to hardcode API keys in every request
вң… Easy to swap keys for different accounts

рҹ”ө Section 2: Send Video Generation Request

рҹ”— Nodes:
3пёҸвғЈ Create Prediction (HTTP Request)
рҹ“Ө Sends a request to Replicate API вҶ’ /v1/predictions

Model: wan-video/wan-2.2-i2v-a14b
Input Parameters:

  рҹ“қ prompt вҶ’ your text description
  рҹ–јпёҸ image вҶ’ input video/image URL
  рҹҺІ seed вҶ’ reproducibility
  рҹҺһпёҸ num_frames вҶ’ 81 frames
  вҸ© sample_shift вҶ’ 5
  вҡҷпёҸ sample_steps вҶ’ 30
  рҹҺ¬ frames_per_second вҶ’ 16

4пёҸвғЈ Extract Prediction ID (Code)
рҹҶ” Pulls out the prediction ID + status from ReplicateвҖҷs response.
This ID is needed for polling until the video finishes generating.

рҹ’Ў Beginner Benefit:
вң… Automates the API call to generate video
вң… Extracts ID вҶ’ avoids manual copy-paste

рҹҹЈ Section 3: Polling & Status Check

рҹ”— Nodes:
5пёҸвғЈ Wait (2 sec)
вҸі Adds a short delay before checking progress.

Prevents API spam

6пёҸвғЈ Check Prediction Status (HTTP Request)
рҹ”„ Calls Replicate API вҶ’ /v1/predictions/{id}

Checks whether the video is still processing or finished

7пёҸвғЈ Check If Complete (IF Node)
вқ“ Compares status вҶ’ succeeded or not

вң… If complete вҶ’ goes to Process Result
вқҢ If not вҶ’ loops back to Wait and tries again

рҹ’Ў Beginner Benefit:
вң… Automatic re-checking вҶ’ you donвҖҷt need to refresh manually
вң… Works until result is ready

рҹҹЎ Section 4: Process Final Result

рҹ”— Nodes:
8пёҸвғЈ Process Result (Code)
рҹ“Ҙ Once complete, extracts:

вң… Status
рҹҺһпёҸ Output video URL
рҹ“Ҡ Generation metrics
вҸұпёҸ Timestamps (created\_at, completed\_at)
рҹ§© Model used

Final output = direct video URL you can download/share рҹҺҘ

рҹ“Ҡ Final Overview

| Section   | What Happens                   | Why ItвҖҷs Useful                   |
| --------- | ------------------------------ | --------------------------------- |
| рҹҹў Auth   | Manual Trigger + API Key       | Secure, easy start                |
| рҹ”ө Send   | Create Prediction + Extract ID | Kicks off video generation        |
| рҹҹЈ Poll   | Wait + Check Status + IF       | Auto-checks progress until done   |
| рҹҹЎ Result | Process Result                 | Gives final video link + metadata |

рҹҡҖ Why This Workflow Rocks

рҹҺҘ Video from Image + Prompt вҶ’ AI-powered video generation in minutes
рҹ”„ Fully automated вҶ’ from request to final video, no manual checks
рҹ”‘ Secure вҶ’ API keys handled safely
вҡҷпёҸ Customizable вҶ’ tweak frames, FPS, prompt, seed

вңЁ With this workflow, youвҖҷve got a personal AI video generator inside n8n вҖ” all you need to do is provide a prompt + input image/video, and youвҖҷll get a fresh AI video link back.

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
1пёҸвғЈ **On clicking 'execute' (Manual Trigger)**
в–¶пёҸ Starts the workflow manually when you click *Execute Workflow*.

2пёҸвғЈ **Set API Key**
рҹ”‘ Stores your **Replicate API Key** securely inside n8n.

* Value: `YOUR_REPLICATE_API_KEY`

рҹ’Ў **Beginner Benefit**:
вң… No need to hardcode API keys in every request
вң… Easy to swap keys for different accounts

# Generate Videos from Images with Wan 2.2 I2V A14B AI Model

### рҹҢҚ Overview

This workflow connects **n8n** with **ReplicateвҖҷs Wan-Video model** to generate **video content from an image + prompt**.
It handles:

* рҹ”‘ API authentication
* рҹ“Ө Sending a generation request
* вҸі Polling until completion
* рҹ“Ҙ Returning a downloadable video link

---

## рҹҹў Section 1: Start & Authentication

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
1пёҸвғЈ **On clicking 'execute' (Manual Trigger)**
в–¶пёҸ Starts the workflow manually when you click *Execute Workflow*.

2пёҸвғЈ **Set API Key**
рҹ”‘ Stores your **Replicate API Key** securely inside n8n.

* Value: `YOUR_REPLICATE_API_KEY`

рҹ’Ў **Beginner Benefit**:
вң… No need to hardcode API keys in every request
вң… Easy to swap keys for different accounts

---

## рҹ”ө Section 2: Send Video Generation Request

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
3пёҸвғЈ **Create Prediction (HTTP Request)**
рҹ“Ө Sends a request to Replicate API вҶ’ `/v1/predictions`

* Model: `wan-video/wan-2.2-i2v-a14b`
* Input Parameters:

  * рҹ“қ `prompt` вҶ’ your text description
  * рҹ–јпёҸ `image` вҶ’ input video/image URL
  * рҹҺІ `seed` вҶ’ reproducibility
  * рҹҺһпёҸ `num_frames` вҶ’ 81 frames
  * вҸ© `sample_shift` вҶ’ 5
  * вҡҷпёҸ `sample_steps` вҶ’ 30
  * рҹҺ¬ `frames_per_second` вҶ’ 16

4пёҸвғЈ **Extract Prediction ID (Code)**
рҹҶ” Pulls out the **prediction ID + status** from ReplicateвҖҷs response.
This ID is needed for polling until the video finishes generating.

рҹ’Ў **Beginner Benefit**:
вң… Automates the API call to generate video
вң… Extracts ID вҶ’ avoids manual copy-paste

---

## рҹҹЈ Section 3: Polling & Status Check

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
5пёҸвғЈ **Wait (2 sec)**
вҸі Adds a short delay before checking progress.

* Prevents API spam

6пёҸвғЈ **Check Prediction Status (HTTP Request)**
рҹ”„ Calls Replicate API вҶ’ `/v1/predictions/{id}`

* Checks whether the video is still processing or finished

7пёҸвғЈ **Check If Complete (IF Node)**
вқ“ Compares status вҶ’ `succeeded` or not

* вң… If complete вҶ’ goes to **Process Result**
* вқҢ If not вҶ’ loops back to **Wait** and tries again

рҹ’Ў **Beginner Benefit**:
вң… Automatic re-checking вҶ’ you donвҖҷt need to refresh manually
вң… Works until result is ready

---

## рҹҹЎ Section 4: Process Final Result

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
8пёҸвғЈ **Process Result (Code)**
рҹ“Ҙ Once complete, extracts:

* вң… Status
* рҹҺһпёҸ Output video URL
* рҹ“Ҡ Generation metrics
* вҸұпёҸ Timestamps (created\_at, completed\_at)
* рҹ§© Model used

Final output = direct **video URL** you can download/share рҹҺҘ

---

## рҹ“Ҡ Final Overview

| Section   | What Happens                   | Why ItвҖҷs Useful                   |
| --------- | ------------------------------ | --------------------------------- |
| рҹҹў Auth   | Manual Trigger + API Key       | Secure, easy start                |
| рҹ”ө Send   | Create Prediction + Extract ID | Kicks off video generation        |
| рҹҹЈ Poll   | Wait + Check Status + IF       | Auto-checks progress until done   |
| рҹҹЎ Result | Process Result                 | Gives final video link + metadata |

---

## рҹҡҖ Why This Workflow Rocks

* рҹҺҘ **Video from Image + Prompt** вҶ’ AI-powered video generation in minutes
* рҹ”„ **Fully automated** вҶ’ from request to final video, no manual checks
* рҹ”‘ **Secure** вҶ’ API keys handled safely
* вҡҷпёҸ **Customizable** вҶ’ tweak frames, FPS, prompt, seed

---

вңЁ With this workflow, youвҖҷve got a **personal AI video generator** inside n8n вҖ” all you need to do is provide a prompt + input image/video, and youвҖҷll get a fresh AI video link back.

---

## рҹ”ө Section 2: Send Video Generation Request

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
3пёҸвғЈ **Create Prediction (HTTP Request)**
рҹ“Ө Sends a request to Replicate API вҶ’ `/v1/predictions`

* Model: `wan-video/wan-2.2-i2v-a14b`
* Input Parameters:

  * рҹ“қ `prompt` вҶ’ your text description
  * рҹ–јпёҸ `image` вҶ’ input video/image URL
  * рҹҺІ `seed` вҶ’ reproducibility
  * рҹҺһпёҸ `num_frames` вҶ’ 81 frames
  * вҸ© `sample_shift` вҶ’ 5
  * вҡҷпёҸ `sample_steps` вҶ’ 30
  * рҹҺ¬ `frames_per_second` вҶ’ 16

4пёҸвғЈ **Extract Prediction ID (Code)**
рҹҶ” Pulls out the **prediction ID + status** from ReplicateвҖҷs response.
This ID is needed for polling until the video finishes generating.

рҹ’Ў **Beginner Benefit**:
вң… Automates the API call to generate video
вң… Extracts ID вҶ’ avoids manual copy-paste

---

## рҹҹЈ Section 3: Polling & Status Check

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
5пёҸвғЈ **Wait (2 sec)**
вҸі Adds a short delay before checking progress.

* Prevents API spam

6пёҸвғЈ **Check Prediction Status (HTTP Request)**
рҹ”„ Calls Replicate API вҶ’ `/v1/predictions/{id}`

* Checks whether the video is still processing or finished

7пёҸвғЈ **Check If Complete (IF Node)**
вқ“ Compares status вҶ’ `succeeded` or not

* вң… If complete вҶ’ goes to **Process Result**
* вқҢ If not вҶ’ loops back to **Wait** and tries again

рҹ’Ў **Beginner Benefit**:
вң… Automatic re-checking вҶ’ you donвҖҷt need to refresh manually
вң… Works until result is ready

---

## рҹҹЎ Section 4: Process Final Result

рҹ”— **Nodes:**
8пёҸвғЈ **Process Result (Code)**
рҹ“Ҙ Once complete, extracts:

* вң… Status
* рҹҺһпёҸ Output video URL
* рҹ“Ҡ Generation metrics
* вҸұпёҸ Timestamps (created\_at, completed\_at)
* рҹ§© Model used

Final output = direct **video URL** you can download/share рҹҺҘ

---
